reply:
[[BLOCK:p_62]]
Mr. 傅思元翔 not only possesses a strong theoretical foundation but also has extensive practical experience. He has served numerous clients, established his own company, and personally handled practical matters such as company formation, corporate governance, company financing, Human Resource Management (人力资源管理), equity incentives, and more. Mr. 傅思元翔 has assembled a professional team dedicated to serving enterprises, engaging in hands-on work over the long term. Through this practical experience, he has accumulated a wealth of knowledge, enabling him to integrate real-world applications into his teaching and services, thereby helping businesses enhance their overall competitiveness.

[[BLOCK:p_63]]
Some of the organizations served by Mr. 傅思元翔 include: 华为技术有限公司, 阿里云计算公司, Kweichow Moutai Group, China Mobile, State Grid Corporation of China, China National Offshore Oil Corporation, China Shenhua Group, China Wind Power Group, Datang Telecom, Jidong Development Group, Agricultural Bank of China, Inner Mongolia Rural Commercial Bank, Jinshang Bank, Huachuang Sanli (Beijing) Energy Technology Co., Ltd., Beijing Mingde New Path Technology Co., Ltd., and many more.

[[BLOCK:p_66]]
【Target Audience】:

[[BLOCK:p_67]]
Managers at all levels within enterprises and individuals interested in Human Resource Management (人力资源管理).

[[BLOCK:p_68]]
【Course Duration】:

[[BLOCK:p_69]]
Half a day to three days.

[[BLOCK:p_70]]
The course can be customized and adjusted as per client needs or tailored specifically for their requirements.
